case_title: PHAN, MRS. AILE VS NGUYEN, MRS. CO DONG (AKA CO DONG NG)

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MRS. AILE PHAN FILED. RE: IN SUPPORT OF OF CLAIMS; BREACH OF CONTRACT.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, MRS. CO DONG (AKA CO DONG NG) AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PHAN, MRS. AILE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF PHAN, MRS. AILE
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, MRS. CO DONG (AKA CO DONG NG) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

AILE $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,622.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27906 ON 9/28/05. NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
